subcodes.first_line: The lovers cast off the garment of existence and don the crimson robe dyed in the blood of martyrdom... O my friend! The undying Fire which the Lord of the Kingdom hath kindled in the midst of the holy Tree is burning fiercely in the midmost heart of the world.
subcodes.first_line_orig: عاشقان خلعت هستی از بر افکنند و قبای سرخی از خون شهادت در بر کنند عارفان ردای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @effort; striving, @growth of the Cause, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
